# terrible_community_general_rundeck_acl_policy (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Sets the project name.

### Optional

- `api_token` (String) Sets the token to authenticate against Rundeck API.
- `client_cert` (String)
- `client_key` (String)
- `force` (String)
- `force_basic_auth` (String)
- `http_agent` (String)
- `policy` (String) Sets the ACL policy content. ACL policy content is a YAML object as described in http://rundeck.org/docs/man5/aclpolicy.html. It can be a YAML string or a pure Ansible inventory YAML object.
- `project` (String) Sets the project which receive the ACL policy. If unset, it is a system ACL policy.
- `state` (String) Create or remove Rundeck project.
- `url_password` (String)
- `url_username` (String)
- `use_proxy` (String)
- `validate_certs` (String)

### Read-Only

- `after` (String) Dictionary containing ACL policy information after modification.
- `before` (String) Dictionary containing ACL policy information before modification.
- `rundeck_response` (String) Rundeck response when a failure occurs.
